title: JB's Small Adventure
introMessage:
This is an example adventure showcasing the possibilities of JB's Adventure Engine.
Enjoy exploring the mine and discovering its secrets - then build your own adventure!
exitMessage:
Thank you for playing JB's Big Adventure! We hope you enjoyed exploring the mine.
See you next time!

Rooms.name: mine entrance
Rooms.description:
You are standing at the entrance of a dark mine.
The air is damp and you can hear the faint sound of dripping water echoing from within.

Rooms.name: mine tunnel
Rooms.description:
You have entered the mine tunnel.
The walls are lined with wooden supports, and the ground is uneven.
You can see faint daylight coming from the south.

Rooms.name: mine chamber
Rooms.description:
You have reached a large chamber within the mine.
The ceiling is high, and there are piles of rocks scattered around.
In the center of the chamber, you see a glowing crystal emitting a soft light.
Behind the crystal there is a wide crack in the ground that seems bottomless.

Rooms.name: mine shaft
Rooms.description:
You have entered a narrow mine shaft.
The walls are close together, and the air is thick with dust.
You can hear the sound of machinery coming from the north.

Rooms.name: mine machinery room
Rooms.description:
You have entered a room filled with old mining machinery.
The machines are covered in rust, and the air is filled with the smell of oil.
You can see a control panel on the wall.

ItemUsages.description:
You step into the elevator and pull the lever.
The elevator descends smoothly down to the underground lake level.

You push the button on the control panel.
The elevator is now on this level.

You plug the fuse into the socket on the elevator's panel.
The panel springs to life. You can now call the elevator to this level.

Rooms.name: mine underground lake
Rooms.description:
You have reached an underground lake within the mine.
The water is dark and still, and you can see the reflection of a lone torch marking the entrance to a dark tunnel.
There is a small moat at the shore.

ItemUsages.description:
You untie the boat and step into it. You use the boat to
cross the underground lake to reach the island on the other side.

You step into the elevator and pull the lever.
The elevator ascends smoothly up to the entrance level.

You push the button on the control panel.
The elevator is now on this level.

You plug the fuse into the socket on the elevator's panel.
The panel springs to life. You can now call the elevator to this level.

Rooms.name: mine drainage tunnel
Rooms.description:
You have entered a narrow drainage tunnel within the mine.
The walls are damp, and the sound of dripping water echoes through the tunnel.

Rooms.name: mine cave-in site
Rooms.description:
You have reached a site where a cave-in has occurred.
The tunnel is blocked by rubble, and you can see dust particles floating in the air.
There is a faint glow visible through a crack far above.

Rooms.name: small lake island
Rooms.description:
You have reached a small island in the middle of the underground lake.
The island is covered with moss and small plants.
There is a wooden pier at the shore.

ItemUsages.description:
You untie the boat and step into it.
You use the boat to cross the underground lake back to the shore.
You climb the ladder to reach the higher level.

Rooms.name: mine ladder shaft
Rooms.description:
You have entered a narrow shaft within the mine.
A sturdy wooden ladder leads downwards to lower levels.

ItemUsages.description: You climb the ladder to reach the lower level.

Items.comment: the boat between location 6 (underground lake location) and location 9 (island location)
Items.name: boat
Items.description: A small wooden boat, suitable for crossing the underground lake.

Items.comment: the elevator between location 5 (upper level machine room) and location 6 (underground lake location)
Items.name: elevator
Items.description:
A sturdy looking elevator cage suitable for transporting mining
equipment or people between levels.

Items.comment: the elevator controls located in location 5 (upper level machine room)
Items.name: control panel
Items.description:
A sturdy looking control panel with a button to call the elevator up.
There is a fuse socket on the side of the panel.

Items.comment: the elevator controls located in location 6 (underground lake location)
Items.name: control panel
Items.description:
A sturdy looking control panel with a button to call the elevator down.
There is a fuse socket on the side of the panel.

Items.comment: the ladder located in location 9 (island location)
Items.name: ladder
Items.description: A sturdy wooden ladder, suitable for climbing to higher levels.

Items.comment: the ladder located in location 10 (corridor above island location)
Items.name: ladder
Items.description: A sturdy wooden ladder, suitable for climbing to lower levels.

Items.comment: a fuse pack found in the mine, located in location 3 (mine chamber)
Items.name: fuse pack
Items.description:
A small pack of fuses, useful for repairing electrical equipment.
There are <numberOfUses> fuses left.

Items.comment: a key found in the mine, located in location 8 (mine cavein) inside a locked chest
Items.name: rusty key
Items.description: A small rusty key, it looks like it could open a simple lock.

Items.comment: a treasure item found in the mine, located in location 8 (mine cavein) inside a locked chest
Items.name: shiny gem
Items.description: A shiny gem that sparkles in the light. It looks valuable.

actions.description: As you examine the gem more closely, you recognize it as the famous Eye Of Bengal!

onExamine.description: As you examine the gem more closely, it you recognize it as the famous Eye Of Bengal!

Items.comment: replaces the 'shiny gem' when that item is examined
Items.name: Eye Of Bengal
Items.description: A beautiful gem known as the Eye Of Bengal. It is said to be worth a fortune.

Containers.comment: a crate located in location 3 (mine chamber) that contains a fuse pack
Containers.name: wooden crate
Containers.description: A wooden crate that seems to have been left behind by the miners.

Containers.comment: a treasure chest located in location 9 (lake island) that contains a shiny gem
Containers.name: treasure chest
Containers.description:
A sturdy looking treasure chest with intricate carvings on its surface.
It seems to be locked.

States.comment: the state of the elevator panel leading down to the lake, which can be either 'operational' or 'broken'
the state of the elevator panel leading up to the upper level, which can be either 'operational' or 'broken'
the state of whether the gem has been examined or not, which can be either 'true' or 'false'
States.description: You had a first look at the gem.

States.comment: the state of whether the gem has been examined or not, which can be either 'true' or 'false'
States.description: You have thoroughly examined the gem.
